title: Money Bags
description: Sea Pickles and Bamboos to Money Bags
body:
💰 Money Bags Texture Pack – Stack Up the Wealth! 💰
Turn your Minecraft world into a fortune-filled paradise with the Money Bags Texture Pack! This fun and simple resource pack transforms sea pickles and bamboo into stacks of money bags, making your inventory look like a vault of riches!

- 💵 Sea Pickles → Money Bags
- 💵 Bamboo → Money Bags

💎 No gameplay changes – just a fresh, wealthier look for your resources!

Time to make it rain in Minecraft! 💰✨
